task_completion.description: Access the ADAudit Plus web interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and navigated to http://localhost:8081, displaying the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus login screen or dashboard.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the administrator profile settings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ADAudit Plus interface shows the 'admin' user's profile, account settings, or personalization page.
The text 'Security Administrator' is visible inside the Full Name or Display Name input field.
The text 'secadmin@globex-financial.com' is visible inside the Email input field.
The text '+1-555-0142' is visible inside the Mobile or Phone input field.
The 'Change Password' section or dialog is open with characters (likely masked as dots/asterisks) entered into the 'New Password' and 'Confirm Password' fields.

task_completion.description: Save the profile and password changes
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message or toast notification indicating that the profile/password was updated successfully, or the profile page reflecting the new saved values.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a standard web browser (like Chrome, Edge, or Firefox) being used, rather than terminal commands like curl or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Verify the application is genuinely ManageEngine ADAudit Plus
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI contains standard ManageEngine ADAudit Plus branding, menus, and layouts, rather than a mock HTML page or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify changes were made through normal UI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open to manipulate the DOM, and the data appears to be entered into actual interactive form fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target URL is http://localhost:8081. The expected profile updates for the 'admin' user are: Full Name: 'Security Administrator', Email: 'secadmin@globex-financial.com', Phone: '+1-555-0142'. The new password should be 'G10bex$ecAudit2024!'.
